allow: Bash(node generate-image.js "I need an illustration for a blog featured image. Do not include any text whatsoever in the image. Background: uniform warm cream \(#F5F0E8\). Illustration style: thick outlines, bold flat color fills, high contrast. Color palette: warm oranges, terracottas, and creams. Show a person standing in front of a simple backdrop, and next to them their digital twin rendered in a slightly different warm tone. Between them, small video frame rectangles cascade downward suggesting mass production. Warm cream background, thick outlines, bold flat fills, no text or labels." "public/blog/images/heygen-ai-avatar-video-guide.png")

Bash(node generate-image.js "I need an illustration for a blog featured image. Do not include any text whatsoever in the image. Background: uniform warm cream \(#F5F0E8\). Illustration style: thick outlines, bold flat color fills, high contrast. Color palette: warm oranges, terracottas, and creams close to #EA580C. Show a person standing in front of a simple backdrop, and next to them their digital twin rendered in a slightly different warm tone. Between them, small video frame rectangles cascade downward suggesting mass production. The illustration sits on the RIGHT side with empty space on the left. Warm cream background, thick outlines, bold flat fills, no text or labels." "public/blog/images/heygen-test.png")
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Generate a WIDE LANDSCAPE image with 16:9 aspect ratio \(much wider than tall\).:*)

Bash(node generate-image.js "Editorial illustration for a blog featured image. No text whatsoever in the image — no labels, no words, no numbers. COMPOSITION: illustration occupies the RIGHT 55% of the wide canvas. The LEFT 45% is completely empty warm cream background reserved for text overlay. Background: uniform warm cream \(#F5F0E8\) everywhere. Style: thick outlines, bold flat color fills, high contrast, editorial illustration. Colors: warm oranges, terracottas, creams close to #EA580C only. No teal, no blue, no cool colors. No funnels, no gears, no lightbulbs, no rockets. One strong visual. For this post: converting rough meeting notes into polished presentations. Show a crumpled messy notepad with scribbled lines on the left-center, and from it clean presentation slides emerge in a neat fanned arrangement to the right — polished and structured. The transformation from scribble to polish should feel dramatic. Thick outlines, bold flat fills, no text, warm cream background." "public/blog/images/gamma-presentations-from-notes.png")

Bash(node generate-image.js "Editorial illustration for a blog featured image. No text whatsoever in the image — no labels, no words, no numbers. COMPOSITION: illustration occupies the RIGHT 55% of the wide canvas. The LEFT 45% is completely empty warm cream background reserved for text overlay. Background: uniform warm cream \(#F5F0E8\) everywhere. Style: thick outlines, bold flat color fills, high contrast, editorial illustration. Colors: warm oranges, terracottas, creams close to #EA580C only. No teal, no blue, no cool colors. No funnels, no gears, no lightbulbs, no rockets. One strong visual. For this post: producing video courses using AI avatars — 39 segments, zero film shoots. Show a person standing confidently, and next to them \(slightly overlapping\) their digital twin in a slightly different warm tone. Between them, small video frame rectangles cascade downward suggesting mass production. The human and digital duplicate should feel like partners not replacements. No camera equipment visible. Thick outlines, bold flat fills, no text, warm cream background." "public/blog/images/heygen-ai-avatar-video-guide.png")
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Editorial illustration only — ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO WORDS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS anywhere in the image. This is critical.:*)
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Editorial illustration. NO TEXT anywhere. NO CAMERAS anywhere.:*)
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Editorial illustration. NO TEXT anywhere. NO CAMERAS, NO FILM EQUIPMENT anywhere in the image.:*)
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Editorial illustration. NO TEXT anywhere — no labels, no words, no numbers.:*)
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Editorial illustration. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO WORDS, NO LETTERS, NO LABELS anywhere. NO BRAIN ICONS. NO COMPUTER SCREENS.:*)
Bash(node generate-image.js 'Wide landscape editorial illustration on warm cream background #F5F0E8. Right side of canvas only — left 45% must be empty cream space.:*)
